description: Controlled endpoint-drift replay: re-run the SAME temporal-supplement entries through the SAME OpenRouter path (anthropic/claude-{opus-4.7,sonnet-4.6}, temp=0, seed=42, identical VERIFICATION_PROMPT) on 2026-05-30, compared label-by-label against the predictions committed 2026-05-04 (commit 493cbb3). Quantifies how much the OpenRouter Anthropic endpoint has drifted; isolates endpoint non-determinism from any label/relabel effect (same inputs, same GT).
